Uses of Class
it.tdlight.jni.TdApi.MaskPosition

  • Uses of TdApi.MaskPosition in it.tdlight.jni

    Fields in it.tdlight.jni declared as TdApi.MaskPosition
    Modifier and Type Field Description
    TdApi.MaskPosition TdApi.InputStickerStatic.maskPosition
    For masks, position where the mask should be placed; may be null.
    TdApi.MaskPosition TdApi.Sticker.maskPosition
    Position where the mask should be placed; may be null.
    Constructors in it.tdlight.jni with parameters of type TdApi.MaskPosition
    Constructor Description
    InputStickerStatic​(TdApi.InputFile sticker, String emojis, TdApi.MaskPosition maskPosition)
    A static sticker in PNG format, which will be converted to WEBP server-side.
    Sticker​(long setId, int width, int height, String emoji, boolean isAnimated, boolean isMask, TdApi.MaskPosition maskPosition, TdApi.ClosedVectorPath[] outline, TdApi.Thumbnail thumbnail, TdApi.File sticker)
    Describes a sticker.
